# 微软主题 `microsoft`

企业蓝，来自 Microsoft Azure / Office 品牌色。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #0078D4;
    --primary-dark:  #004E8C;
    --primary-light: #2B88D8;
    --primary-pale:  #E8F2FB;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(0, 120, 212, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #002050 0%, #004E8C 35%, #0078D4 65%, #2B88D8 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #002050 0%, #004E8C 50%, #0078D4 100%);
    --red:           #D13438;
    --green:         #107C10;
    --orange:        #CA5010;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #002050 0%, #004E8C 50%, #0078D4 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #002050 0%, #004E8C 35%, #0078D4 65%, #2B88D8 100%) !important; }
```
